what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG document-file icon with a folded corner and a small "DOC" text label inside the page shape.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox="0 0 24 24" with no default fill.
The document outline is drawn with stroked paths using currentColor, 1.5 stroke width, round caps, and round joins.
A second path draws the folded-corner detail from the top edge to the right edge.
The label "DOC" is rendered as an SVG text element at x="7" y="17" with font size 4.5 and font weight 700.
The text fill uses currentColor and disables stroke.
standouts: Uses currentColor for both strokes and the text fill.
Represents file type through live SVG text rather than path outlines.
Combines a generic document outline with an explicit DOC label.
conventions: Follows common inline icon conventions: 24x24 viewBox, currentColor, no default fill, rounded stroke joins and caps.
Uses path elements for the document geometry.
Uses a text element for the file-type label, which is less geometry-only than many icon sets.
concerns: The live text label may render with slight font-dependent differences across environments.
The small DOC text may lose legibility at very small icon sizes.
notes: A compact DOC file icon made from stroked document geometry plus a currentColor text label.
questions: Was the DOC label intended to remain editable text or be converted to paths for rendering consistency?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a DOC file icon, and the SVG content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable, color-inheriting icon for representing DOC document files in an interface.
novelty: The notable distinction is the use of a live SVG text label inside a small outline icon.
contribution: Contributes a themeable DOC document icon substrate with simple document geometry, a folded-corner cue, and an explicit file-type label that a fused system would keep as a document-format visual marker.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG icon showing an outlined document with a folded corner and a small bold DOC label.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing DOC document files as a reusable interface icon that inherits surrounding text color.
